UNCONTESTED CALENDAR OF OCT-28-2021, NOTICE OF DEFAULT PROVE-UP HEARING - GRANTED ON THE PAPERS WITHOUT FURTHER HEARING. MATTER WAS BEFORE THE COURT FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, OCTOBER 21, 2021. ONLY REMAINING ISSUE IS THE FINAL DETERMINATION ON AN AWARD OF ATTORNEY FEES. COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED JUDGMENT TO THE COURT FOR REVIEW AND SIGNATURE. NO APPEARANCE. NOT REPORTED. JUDGE: MURLENE J. RANDLE. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. (D514)
MINI MINUTES FOR AUG-19-2019 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION, DEPT. 302, THE COURT ADOPTED THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF SAN MATEO CREDIT UNION'S APPLICATION OF WRIT OF POSSESSION IS OFF CALENDAR. PLAINTIFF SAN MATEO CREDIT UNION FAILED TO SERVE DEFENDANT WITH THE NOTICE OF APPLICATION FOR WRIT OF POSSESSION AT LEAST 16 COURT DAYS PRIOR TO THE HEARING. (CODE CIV. PROC. SECS. 484.040, 1005(A)(1), (B).) JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: MARIA A. TORREANO CSR#8600, EMAIL: MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM (302/EPS)

Notice Of Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Oct-28-2021 Granted Per Written Order

Notice Of Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Oct-21-2021 Continued To Oct-28-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Prove-Up Hearing as to defaulted defendant Amjad Abudiab.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: K. Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

Timothy J. Silverman, Esq. appeared for plaintiff San Mateo Credit Union.
Dani Robinson, Vice President for Credit Risk for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Amjad Abudiab.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Contract, Possession, Conversion and Money Lent was filed April 30, 2019, and personally served on defendant Amjad Abudiab on July 29, 2019.
Default as to defendant Amjad Abudiab was entered on February 11, 2020.
DOE defendants were dismissed December 3, 2020.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff San Mateo Credit Union, and against the defaulted defendant Amjad Abudiab, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $38,879.68.
Prejudgment Interest - $16,833.23.
Attorney Fees - TBD.*
Costs - $772.00.
Minus Credit - $2,724,.00.

Total - To Be Determined.

Additionally, plaintiff is entitled to the restitution and possession of the collateral, which consists of a 2014 BMW 6 Series, VIN WBA6B2C52ED128826. Defendant Amjad Abudiab shall receive a credit once the collateral is sold post-judgment in accordance with California Commercial Code Section 9504.

Matter is CONTINUED to October 28, 2021 for determination on attorney fees and issuance of Court Judgment.

*Any award of attorney fees is predicated on the rate of $310.00 per hour.

Off Calendar Sep-13-2019 Continued To Nov-13-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

NOTICE OF APPLICATION OF WRIT OF POSSESSION AND HEARING And Hearing
Off Calendar Aug-19-2019 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Timothy J. Silverman, Esq. of Scheer Law Group, T: 949.263.8757 x115, for plaintiff and moving party, by Court Call;
No other appearance.

RULING: The tentative ruling is argued. Plaintiff's counsel's request for continuance is denied. After argument, the Court adopted the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF SAN MATEO CREDIT UNION'S APPLICATION OF WRIT OF POSSESSION is OFF CALENDAR. Plaintiff San Mateo Credit Union failed to serve defendant with the notice of application for writ of possession at least 16 court days prior to the hearing. (Code Civ. Proc. Secs. 484.040, 1005(a)(1), (b).)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com
